whatIsVps.question: What is a VPS? How is it different from shared hosting?
whatIsVps.answer: A VPS (Virtual Private Server) provides dedicated CPU, memory, and storage resources that are not affected by other users. Compared to shared hosting, VPS offers higher performance, better security, and full root access.

migration.question: Can I migrate from another provider?
migration.answer: Absolutely. We offer free migration assistance — our technical team will help you seamlessly migrate your websites, databases, and applications to our platform.

uptime.question: What is your uptime guarantee?
uptime.answer: We guarantee 99.99% network uptime SLA. Our infrastructure features redundant power, networking, and storage with automatic failover mechanisms.

billing.question: What billing options are available?
billing.answer: We support monthly, quarterly, and annual billing cycles. Longer commitments come with greater discounts. We accept credit cards, Alipay, WeChat Pay, and more.

support.question: How can I get help if I have issues?
support.answer: We provide 24/7 technical support. You can reach us via the ticket system or email, and our engineering team responds in under 15 minutes on average.

whatIsVps.question: What is a VPS cloud server?
whatIsVps.answer: A VPS (Virtual Private Server) is an isolated computing environment created from a physical server using virtualization technology. Each VPS has dedicated CPU, memory, storage, and bandwidth resources, offering performance and control similar to a dedicated server at a more affordable price.

vsShared.question: How is VPS different from shared hosting?
vsShared.answer: With shared hosting, multiple users share the same server resources, and one user's high load can affect others. VPS provides isolated dedicated resources guaranteeing stable performance. Additionally, VPS offers full root access, allowing you to install any software and customize system configurations.

chooseSpec.question: How do I choose the right VPS configuration?
chooseSpec.answer: For personal blogs or lightweight apps, 1 vCPU + 1GB RAM is sufficient. Medium websites or applications should consider 2-4 vCPU + 4-8GB RAM. High-traffic websites or database servers need 4+ vCPU + 8GB+ RAM. You can upgrade your configuration at any time without redeployment.

migration.question: Can I migrate from another provider?
migration.answer: Absolutely. We offer free migration assistance — our technical team will help seamlessly migrate your websites, databases, and applications to our platform. The entire process typically completes within hours, minimizing downtime.

uptime.question: What is your uptime guarantee?
uptime.answer: We guarantee 99.99% network uptime SLA. Our infrastructure features redundant power, networking, and storage with automatic failover. If we fail to meet our SLA commitment, we provide proportional service credit compensation.

billing.question: What billing options are available?
billing.answer: We support monthly, quarterly, and annual billing cycles. Longer commitments come with greater discounts. We accept credit cards, PayPal, Alipay, WeChat Pay, and more. All plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee.

support.question: How can I get help if I have issues?
support.answer: We provide 24/7 technical support. Reach us via the ticket system or email — our engineering team responds in under 15 minutes on average. We also maintain a comprehensive documentation center and knowledge base.

refund.question: What is your refund policy?
refund.answer: All new plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee. If you're unsatisfied with the service within 30 days of purchase, you can request a full refund — no questions asked.

cta.title: Ready to Get Started?
cta.description: Sign up now and deploy your cloud server in minutes. All plans include a 30-day money-back guarantee.

twoFactor.notEnabledDesc: Enable two-factor authentication to add an extra layer of security to your account.
twoFactor.enabledDesc: Your account is protected with two-factor authentication.
twoFactor.step1ScanQRDesc: Scan the QR code below with your authenticator app (Google Authenticator, Authy, etc.).

twoFactor.step2EmailCodeDesc: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email.
twoFactor.step3RecoveryCodesDesc: Save these recovery codes in a safe place. Each code can only be used once.
twoFactor.recoveryCodesWarning: These codes will not be shown again. Please save them securely.
twoFactor.confirmDisableDesc: Enter your password to disable 2FA. This will reduce your account security.
twoFactor.regenerateDesc: Enter your password to generate new recovery codes. Old codes will be invalidated.
twoFactor.loginDesc: Enter the verification code to complete sign in.
